name: 回溯触发（移动）
description: 对手移动时计数，达到目标时执行回溯
code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.recallData || battle.extensions.recallData.length === 0) return { success: false }; var actor = context.sourcePiece; if (!actor) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = battle.extensions.recallData.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var recall = battle.extensions.recallData[i]; if (actor.ownerPlayerId === recall.ownerPlayerId) continue; recall.actionCount = (recall.actionCount || 0) + 1; if (recall.actionCount >= recall.targetCount) { var piece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === recall.pieceId; }); if (piece && recall.snapshot) { piece.x = recall.snapshot.x; piece.y = recall.snapshot.y; piece.currentHp = Math.min(recall.snapshot.hp, piece.maxHp); if (recall.snapshot.shield !== undefined) piece.shield = recall.snapshot.shield; if (recall.snapshot.statusTags) piece.statusTags = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.statusTags)); if (recall.snapshot.buffs) piece.buffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.buffs)); if (recall.snapshot.debuffs) piece.debuffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.debuffs)); messages.push(piece.name + '回溯！（对手操作数达到' + recall.targetCount + '）'); triggered = true; } battle.extensions.recallData.splice(i, 1); } } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }
